positive: A retro-futuristic portrait of a person wearing an ornate, steampunk diving helmet, standing on a cliff overlooking a vibrant, stylized cityscape. Style: Art Deco meets Steampunk, highly detailed line art, sepia tones, dramatic composition, vintage engraving look.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern clothing, grunge, messy
